topic.title: SAP TM End-to-End Mock Viva (Accenture Final Assessment Style)

learningObjectives.title: Understand final assessment structure
learningObjectives.description: Practice progression from SAP TM fundamentals to consultant-level scenario and implementation discussions.

learningObjectives.title: Understand consultant-level explanation quality
learningObjectives.description: Deliver business-first, process-driven answers with strong communication and confidence.

learningObjectives.title: Understand full lifecycle articulation
learningObjectives.description: Explain complete transportation flow from order to settlement and reporting in viva settings.

sections.title: SAP TM End-to-End Mock Viva (Accenture Final Assessment Style)

sections.content: This mock viva simulates the final technical assessment conducted after SAP TM stream training. The interviewer evaluates conceptual understanding, business process knowledge, communication skills, problem-solving ability and confidence. Questions become progressively more difficult, moving from fundamentals to consultant-level implementation scenarios.

sections.title: Assessment Strategy
sections.content: Interviewers assess not only whether your answer is correct, but also whether you can explain the business process logically and confidently.

sections.title: Basic Questions
rows: Transportation planning, execution and freight settlement solution.
Optimize transportation cost, planning and execution.
Planning object created from transportation demand.

sections.title: Business Process Questions
rows: Planning recommendation generated before Freight Order creation.
Selection based on cost, service level, capacity and business rules.
Management of trucks, trailers and drivers.
Charge calculation, invoice verification and carrier payment.
Why integrate SAP TM with SAP EWM?

sections.title: Consultant Scenarios
rows: Exception management, replanning and alternate resource assignment.
Execute carrier selection again and assign another carrier.
Analyze charge calculation, carrier rates and planning optimization.
Shipment is delayed because of warehouse issues.
Coordinate through SAP EWM integration and replan transportation.
Hypercare support, root cause analysis and permanent resolution.

sections.title: Implementation Knowledge
rows: Discover → Prepare → Explore → Realize → Deploy → Run.
What is the purpose of regression testing?

items: Explain every SAP TM object confidently.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Treat every answer as if you are explaining the solution to a customer. Focus on the business problem first, then explain how SAP TM solves it.

sections.title: Consultant-Level Sample Answer
sections.content: Question: Explain the complete SAP TM process. Answer: Transportation demand originates from an outbound delivery. SAP TM creates Freight Units, optimizes planning, selects the most suitable carrier, generates Freight Orders, monitors execution through events, calculates freight charges, performs Freight Settlement and finally provides analytical reports for continuous improvement.

sections.title: Accenture Assessment Tip
sections.content: Many final assessments are scenario-based. If you don't remember a technical term, explain the business process logically instead of remaining silent.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Do not rush your answers. Speak slowly, explain the sequence of events and clearly state the business benefit at the end of each response.

items: Frequently asked technical and functional questions covered.
HR and managerial interview preparation completed.
Ready for SAP TM stream viva and certification interview.
